title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - TVS Motor International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor International Enterprises in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor International Enterprises:
TVS Motor International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor International Enterprises!
